title: phyllanthus tenuis
intro: Phyllanthus tenuis, also known as Narrow-leaved Phyllanthus or Thin-leaved Phyllanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus tenuis include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Phyllanthus tenuis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
